calendarNotes:
Houston ISD begins the 2026-2027 school year on August 10, 2026 — among the earliest start dates of any major urban district in the country. Spring Break runs March 8–12, 2027, one of the earliest Spring Break windows in Texas, and the school year ends May 28, 2027. Families relocating from the Northeast, Midwest, or West Coast should plan end-of-summer activities well before mid-August. The early start is consistent across Texas but stands out sharply from states like California or New York, where many districts begin in late August or after Labor Day.

Houston sits within the Atlantic hurricane belt, and the district builds emergency makeup days into its calendar to account for potential weather-related closures between August and November. Texas law requires districts to make up lost days if closures exceed a threshold, and HISD may extend the school year into early June in severe cases. Families planning travel in late May should book refundable options or wait until final schedules are confirmed. Houston's August and September heat (frequently above 100°F) also means the earliest school weeks of the year are among the hottest — after-school outdoor activities should be scheduled carefully.

HISD shares Harris County with several large suburban districts including Katy ISD, Cypress-Fairbanks ISD, Spring ISD, and Conroe ISD. These districts are not part of HISD and set their own academic calendars. In some years their Spring Break dates differ from HISD's by a few days to a full week. Families with children in both HISD and a suburban Harris County district should confirm each district's schedule independently. The boundary between HISD and suburban districts can run through the middle of neighborhoods — verify your assigned district using the HISD school finder rather than assuming by city or zip code.

HISD operates one of the largest magnet school systems in Texas, spanning STEM, arts, dual-language, and International Baccalaureate programs across elementary, middle, and high school levels. Applications for magnet programs typically open in the fall for the following school year. Families new to the district who are interested in magnet enrollment should contact the district's School Choice office no later than October to understand timelines — applications for the most competitive programs often close by December.
